title: excoecaria formosana
intro: Excoecaria formosana, also known as Taiwan yellow oleander or Formosan yellow oleander, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Excoecaria formosana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are used to treat a variety of health conditions.
